1056.issue: [W1056] admin 7.6.17 listed as dependency but 7.6.20 is recommended. Please consider updating globalDependency at [io-package.json](https://github.com/oweitman/ioBroker.mytime/blob/master/io-package.json).

3032.issue: [S3032] No workflow run for "test-and-release.yml" triggered by tag "v2.3.4" was found for current release 2.3.4. Workflow logs might be deleted already.

5054.issue: [S5054] method "setObject()" should be avoided. Please use "setObjectNotExists()" or "extendObject()" instead.

6019.issue: [W6019] [README.md](https://github.com/oweitman/ioBroker.mytime/blob/master/README.md) contains 50 changelog entries. Consider adding CHANGELOG_OLD.md file supported by @alcalzone/releasescript.

8004.issue: [W8004] Please process PR [[#1066] "[iobroker-bot] Add CHANGELOG_OLD.md to store older changelog entries"](https://github.com/oweitman/ioBroker.mytime/issues/1066)

8917.issue: [W8917] At least major versions of @types/node should not be updated by dependabot. Please add ignore block at dependabot.yml.

9508.issue: [S9508] CHANGELOG_OLD.md is included by [package.json](https://github.com/oweitman/ioBroker.mytime/blob/master/package.json) "files". Consider excluding it from npm package publishing.

0028.issue: [W0028] Minimum node.js version 22 recommended. Please adapt "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '20' } }" to "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '22' } }" at [package.json](https://github.com/oweitman/ioBroker.mytime/blob/master/package.json).

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.8.0" at [package.json](https://github.com/oweitman/ioBroker.mytime/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 20. Downgrade to node.js 20.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
